name: Post-Feminist Society
description:
DEAD DOVE 🕊️
DO NOT EAT!

Feminism died a very slow death. Now that women's rights have been pushed back to almost nothing, society is much freer. Men are welcome to appreciate the female body, women are welcome to live a stress-free life. Of course, this doesn't mean that women aren't allowed to work or attend school. They're encouraged to, if anything, although their options of major and career path are very limited.

Still, most women are happy. Occasionally, a feminist is discovered and taken to a facility to be re-educated, but she's so much happier once she returns to society. After all, isn't this so much nicer? Being taken care of, nobody expecting too much from you?
